title: QuickBinds
description: Advanced client-side mod that allows you to create powerful command keybinds and macros. Features: profiles with automatic server switching, Basic and Extended modes, action chains with WAIT delays, rich placeholders, favorites, logs, and other.
body:
# QuickBinds
QuickBinds is a client-side mod for Fabric **1.21.1–1.21.11** that allows you to bind commands, chat messages, key presses, mouse clicks, sounds, titles, and more to custom key combinations.

![Chain bind](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/d6a67772a6fe79a5229eee7609078d56a1f8235d.png)

## Features

* **Basic & Extended Setup:** Choose between a simplified bind editor or an advanced one with extra stages.
* **Single Actions & Chains:** Create simple binds or full action chains / macros.
* **Multi-Key Combinations:** Create multiple key blocks (up to 3 keys per block) — bind activates when any block is pressed.
* **Profiles:** Create multiple profiles for different playstyles or servers.
* **Profile Settings:** Rename profiles and assign server addresses for automatic profile loading.
* **Auto Profile Loading:** Profiles can switch automatically when joining specific servers.
* **Favorites:** Mark important binds and keep them at the top of the list.
* **Search:** Quickly filter binds by name in the main list.
* **Color Markers:** Assign colors to binds for visual organization.
* **Execution Log:** View history of recently executed binds.
* **Command & Chat Messages:** Bind text, commands (for example `/home`), or local client-side messages (`*message`) to keys.
* **Key Press Simulation:** Simulate pressing any keyboard key.
* **Mouse Simulation:** Simulate Left Click (Attack) or Right Click (Use).
* **Sound Action:** Play any game sound with customizable volume and pitch.
* **Title/Subtitle/Action Bar:** Display large titles, subtitles, or action bar messages.
* **WAIT Action:** Add pauses inside chains without using per-action delays.
* **Execution Stages:**
  * **On Press** — executes when the bind is activated.
  * **Main Action** — the main action stage.
  * **On Release** — executes when the bind is released or finished.
* **Execution Modes:**
  * **Press** — executes once.
  * **Toggle** — turns the bind on/off with each press.
  * **Hold** — keeps the bind active while the key is held.
* **Chain Mode:** Execute multiple actions in sequence.
* **Random Mode:** Pick a random action from a chain.
* **Repeat:** Automatically repeat the main action when supported by the mode.
* **Placeholders:** Insert dynamic variables like `{x}`, `{y}`, `{z}`, `{health}`, `{dimension}`, `{held_item}`, `{clipboard}`, and more.
* **Math Expressions:** Use simple math like `{10+5}` or `{20-3}` directly in messages.
* **Import/Export:** Share your binds using clipboard code.
* **Tooltips & Help Screen:** Built-in hints and documentation inside the GUI.
* **Multi-language:** English, Russian, Polish, Ukrainian, German, French, Portuguese (Brazil).

## Usage

1. Press the **`~`** key to open the main menu.
2. Use the profile buttons to create, delete, switch, or edit profiles.
3. Click **+ Add Bind**.
4. Choose:
   * **Single Action** or **Chain / Macro**
   * **Basic** or **Extended**
5. In the edit screen:
   * Enter a bind name
   * Configure key combinations (click the Keys button)
   * Select the execution mode
   * Configure the available action stages
   * For chains, add multiple actions and optionally use **WAIT**
6. Click **Save**.

## Basic vs Extended

* **Basic** — only the **Main Action** stage is available.
* **Extended** — gives access to:
  * **On Press**
  * **Main Action**
  * **On Release**

## Action Types

* **Message** — Sends chat, command, or local text depending on prefix
* **Mouse** — Simulates left or right mouse click
* **Key Press** — Simulates pressing a selected key
* **Sound** — Plays a game sound with configurable volume and pitch
* **Title** — Displays a large title on screen
* **Subtitle** — Displays a subtitle below the title
* **Action Bar** — Displays a message above the hotbar
* **Wait** — Inserts a timed pause inside a chain (chain mode only)

## Placeholders

* `{x}`, `{y}`, `{z}` — Current coordinates
* `{dimension}` — Current dimension
* `{nickname}` — Your player name
* `{health}` — Current health
* `{held_item}` — Name of item in main hand
* `{held_amount}` — Stack size in main hand
* `{durability}` — Remaining durability of held item
* `{offhand_item}` — Name of item in offhand
* `{armor}` — Total armor points
* `{food}` — Current food level
* `{xp_level}` — Current XP level
* `{gamemode}` — Current gamemode
* `{biome}` — Current biome
* `{direction}` — Facing direction
* `{server_ip}` — Server IP (or `Singleplayer`)
* `{ping}` — Current ping
* `{fps}` — Current FPS
* `{clipboard}` — Contents of your clipboard

## Prefixes

* `/command` — sends a command
* `*text` — shows a local client-side message
* `"text"` — sends plain text without prefix behavior

## Have an idea for mod update?

* Join our [Discord](https://discord.gg/ZpXerhFQjS)!
